name: @agiterra/wallet-extension
description: Chrome extension for agent-driven dApp wallet interactions. Multi-wallet vault, Wire-mediated signing (with manual + local-RPC fallbacks), EIP-1193 surface.

scripts.build: bun build src/background.ts --outfile=dist/background.js --target=browser --format=esm && bun build src/content-script.ts --outfile=dist/content-script.js --target=browser --format=iife && bun build src/inpage.ts --outfile=dist/inpage.js --target=browser --format=iife && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp -R icons dist/icons 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.watch: bun build src/background.ts --outfile=dist/background.js --target=browser --format=esm --watch & bun build src/content-script.ts --outfile=dist/content-script.js --target=browser --format=iife --watch & bun build src/inpage.ts --outfile=dist/inpage.js --target=browser --format=iife --watch

author: Tim Garthwaite <https://github.com/mividtim>
